raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The section asserts conceptual claims — structural fleet-size-invariance of the combined strategy and two distinct distribution-shift axes — that a review should interrogate for framing accuracy and completeness.","R1.2":"Three explicit logical chains are present (invariance via component-level independence; PPO/CMDP gap as rolling-replan mismatch not fleet-size artifact; LP degradation as out-of-distribution extrapolation), each with stated premises and conclusions that require consistency checking.","R1.3":"The section is dense with specific quantitative claims (100% commitment, 40–50% for PPO/CMDP, 91%→40% degradation for LP, N=200–1000 transition, training range 50–400 vehicles) that must be traceable to experimental results, tables, or figures.","R1.6":"A bare 'review' delegation naturally encompasses prose quality; sentence-level precision and clarity are in scope alongside technical scrutiny."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the review focus on (a) technical accuracy — verifying the logical soundness of the invariance and extrapolation arguments and checking the stated percentages against experimental data — or (b) writing quality — improving clarity, precision, and readability of the prose?"}

rationale.R1.1: The section asserts conceptual claims — structural fleet-size-invariance of the combined strategy and two distinct distribution-shift axes — that a review should interrogate for framing accuracy and completeness.
rationale.R1.2: Three explicit logical chains are present (invariance via component-level independence; PPO/CMDP gap as rolling-replan mismatch not fleet-size artifact; LP degradation as out-of-distribution extrapolation), each with stated premises and conclusions that require consistency checking.
rationale.R1.3: The section is dense with specific quantitative claims (100% commitment, 40–50% for PPO/CMDP, 91%→40% degradation for LP, N=200–1000 transition, training range 50–400 vehicles) that must be traceable to experimental results, tables, or figures.
rationale.R1.6: A bare 'review' delegation naturally encompasses prose quality; sentence-level precision and clarity are in scope alongside technical scrutiny.

parsed.clarification_question: Should the review focus on (a) technical accuracy — verifying the logical soundness of the invariance and extrapolation arguments and checking the stated percentages against experimental data — or (b) writing quality — improving clarity, precision, and readability of the prose?
